category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a repository tool for Android development.
source_facts.source-archive is the official git-repo source on Gerrit, indicating a Git/repository workflow tool.
docs_sources: Official Android Open Source Project documentation provides the Repo command reference.
Official Gerrit git-repo repository README is linked from the source repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is https://gerrit.googlesource.com/git-repo.git, whose official repository URL is https://gerrit.googlesource.com/git-repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists repo and current_curation.tags includes cli.
